summary: Delta v7 testing complete - Bills page restored, PUT /bills/{id} edit with inventory rebalance, thermal print bill/KOT from Billing header and every Bills row all verified. 8/8 backend tests pass, all frontend flows pass.
critical_code_review_comments: billing_router.restore_inventory uses silent try/except so inventory restore failures are swallowed. If an ObjectId is malformed in historical deductions, the inventory will drift without any log. Consider logging.warning on exception.
PUT /bills/{bill_id} does not validate ObjectId format — malformed id raises bson.errors.InvalidId → 500. Should wrap in try/except and raise 400.

PUT /bills/{bill_id} uses same BillCreate schema, so total/subtotal on wire are ignored and recomputed on server. Good. But missing a unique bill_number field in update — which is correct (immutable), could document.
usePrint.js uses setTimeout(50) before window.print(). In slow browsers the state update may not have flushed; consider useEffect on bill+kind to trigger print, more deterministic.
PrintableReceipt.jsx hardcodes CAFE constants — fine for single-outlet, but not config-driven. Should move to backend /api/settings when multi-outlet arrives.
Bills.jsx EditModal: 'Save' does not validate that cash+upi totals equal bill total for cash+upi payment mode (Billing.jsx does this check). Should add same validation.
Bills.jsx EditModal: quantity can be decremented to 0 via the Minus button, but save sends quantity=1 fallback silently. Either hide Minus at qty=1 or block save with qty=0.
billing_router.py: leftover is_voided:False and unused /void handler removed cleanly (returns 404). Dead field on doc is low priority cleanup.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_v7_milk inventory, TEST_v7_latte menu item + recipe, TEST_v7_edit_rebalance bill for edit/rebalance test. Cleaned up within fixtures. Also UI_TEST_v7 bill created via Billing page (not cleaned, minor data).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bills page at /entry/bills with testids: entry-bills-date, eb-count/rev/cash/upi, eb-row-<id>, view-eb-<id>, edit-eb-<id>, print-bill-<id>, print-kot-<id>. Edit modal: edit-bill-name, edit-bill-phone, edit-item-name-<idx>, edit-item-price-<idx>, edit-item-qty-<idx>, remove-item-<idx>, edit-overall-disc, edit-pay-cash|upi|cash+upi, save-edit-bill-btn. Billing header prints: print-bill-btn, print-kot-btn (only when lastBill). For print testing override window.print: page.evaluate('() => { window.__printCalls = 0; window.print = () => window.__printCalls++; }') and assert document.querySelector('.print-root .print-receipt[data-receipt-kind="bill"|"kot"]'). Backend inventory requires min_quantity not reorder_level; banking POST is /api/banking with depositor_name; recipes need menu_item_name.

verified_flows.put_bills_edit_inventory_rebalance: PASS - qty 1->2 deducts extra 100ml, 2->1 restores 100ml, net matches source-of-truth (backend test)
verified_flows.bills_page_ui: PASS - header 'Bills · Customer Details', 4 stat cards, date picker, all row testids present
verified_flows.edit_modal_ui: PASS - all fields prefilled & editable, save closes modal, toast 'DB... updated · inventory rebalanced' shown, row refreshed
verified_flows.print_bill_from_billing_header: PASS - clicking print-bill-btn calls window.print and .print-root .print-receipt[data-receipt-kind='bill'] exists
verified_flows.sidebar_bills_nav: PASS - nav-bills entry visible between Billing and Routines
